# services.zeronsd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.zeronsd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.zeronsd.servedNetworks` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | ZeroTier Networks to start zeronsd instances for. |
| `services.zeronsd.servedNetworks.<name>.package` | `package` | The zeronsd package to use. |
| `services.zeronsd.servedNetworks.<name>.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Settings for zeronsd |
| `services.zeronsd.servedNetworks.<name>.settings.domain` | `(optionally newline-terminated) single-line string` | Domain under which ZeroTier records will be available. |
| `services.zeronsd.servedNetworks.<name>.settings.log_level` | `one of "off", "error", "warn", "info", "debug", "trace"` | Log Level. |
| `services.zeronsd.servedNetworks.<name>.settings.token` | `absolute path` | Path to a file containing the API Token for ZeroTier Central. |
| `services.zeronsd.servedNetworks.<name>.settings.wildcard` | `boolean` | Whether to serve a wildcard record for ZeroTier Nodes. |
